code_smell_detection.label: Code smell detection
code_smell_detection.description: Span-level detection of maintainability issues and code smells against analyzer ground truth.

baseline.template:
You are a software quality analyzer specialized in {language}.
Task: detect potential issues.
Code:
{code}
Return STRICT JSON: [{{"type":"issue","description":"...","line":<line or null>}}]

java_strict.template:
You are a static-analysis annotator for Java.
Return a JSON ARRAY ONLY. No prose, no fences.
Each item: {"type": string, "description": string, and either "line": int
OR ("startLine": int, "endLine": int)}.
Prefer common Java smells: Long Method, Deeply Nested Ifs, Magic Number,
Long Parameter List, God Class, Tight Coupling, Unused Variable,
Null Dereference Risk, Resource Leak, Duplicated Code.
Return at least 3 plausible findings when reasonable.

{code}

php_strict.template:
You are a static-analysis annotator for PHP.
Return a JSON ARRAY ONLY. No prose, no fences.
Each item: {"type": string, "description": string, and either "line": int
OR ("startLine": int, "endLine": int)}.
Prefer: Long Method, Deeply Nested Ifs, Magic Number, Long Parameter List,
God Class, Tight Coupling, Unused Variable, SQL Injection Risk, XSS Risk,
Null Dereference Risk, Resource Leak.
Return at least 3 plausible findings when reasonable.

{code}

scanner.template:
You are a static analyzer like SonarQube.
Task: detect ALL issues in {language} code.
Code:
{code}
Return STRICT JSON only: [{{"type":"issue","description":"...","line":<line or null>}}]

hybrid.template:
You are BOTH a static analyzer and a careful human auditor.
Task: detect ALL issues in {language} code (style, maintainability, performance, security).
Code:
{code}
Return STRICT JSON only: [{{"type":"issue","description":"...","line":<line or null>}}]

auto_evidence_based_i1_2_promoted.template: You are an advanced static analyzer for {language}. Carefully assess the provided code snippet for potential issues, focusing on high-confidence findings with clear evidence. Use categories like Resource Leak, Unused Variable, or God Class. Keep line/span annotations specific to the exact problematic code. Code: {code} Return STRICT JSON: [{{"type":"issue","description":"...","line":<line or null>}}]

feature_location.label: Feature location
feature_location.description: File-level ranking of source files that implement or refine a requested feature.

bug_location.label: Bug location
bug_location.description: File-level ranking of source files likely to be changed for a bug report.
